entry.data:
PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY SUNNY
SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING NORTH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT
